title: Extended Grounding Metadata Schema
description: YAML frontmatter schema for grounding section, extended with manual verdict support

verdict.description: Verification verdict. 'manual' indicates user-described behavior with no documentation source.

score.description: Confidence score. Not required for manual verdict.

generator.description: Model that generated the test. Not required for manual verdict.

critic.description: Model that verified the test. Not required for manual verdict.

verified_at.description: Verification timestamp. Not required for manual verdict.

unverified_claims.description: Claims that couldn't be verified. Only for partial verdict.

source.description: Origin of the test case. 'user-described' for undocumented behaviors.

created_by.description: Username of the person who described the behavior. Used with manual verdict.

note.description: Optional context about why this behavior isn't documented.
